content.thinking: Let me get a summary of the MCP tools to see what commands are available.

arguments.command:
cat /home/igorp/.pi/agent/mcp-cache.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'--- {s} ---'); [print(f'  - {t[\"name\"]}: {t[\"description\"][:80]}') for t in sv['tools']] for s,sv in d['servers'].items()]" 2>/dev/null || cat /home/igorp/.pi/agent/mcp-cache.json | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s, sv in d['servers'].items():
    print(f'--- {s} ---')
    for t in sv.get('tools', []):
        desc = t.get('description', '')[:80]
        print(f'  - {t[\"name\"]}: {desc}')
"

content.text:
--- figma-mcp-go ---
  - export_frames_to_pdf: Export multiple frames as a single multi-page PDF file. Each frame becomes one p
  - export_tokens: Export all design tokens (variables and paint styles) as JSON or CSS custom prop
  - get_annotations: Get dev-mode annotations in the current document or scoped to a specific node. R
  - get_design_context: Get a depth-limited, token-efficient tree of the current selection or page. Use 
  - get_document: Get the full node tree of the current page (not the whole file — only the active
  - get_fonts: List all fonts used in the current page, sorted by usage frequency. Useful for u
  - get_local_components: Get all components defined in the current Figma file.
  - get_metadata: Get metadata about the current Figma document: file name, pages, current page
  - get_node: Get a single node by ID with full detail. Use get_nodes_info to fetch multiple n
  - get_nodes_info: Get full details for multiple nodes by ID in one round-trip. Prefer this over ca
  - get_pages: List all pages in the document with their IDs and names. Lightweight alternative
  - get_reactions: Get the prototype reactions defined on a node. Returns an array of reaction obje
  - get_selection: Get the nodes currently selected in Figma. Returns an empty array if nothing is 
  - get_styles: Get all local styles in the document (paint, text, effect, and grid). Returns ea
  - get_variable_defs: Get all local variable definitions: collections, modes, and values. Variables ar
  - get_viewport: Get the current Figma viewport: scroll center, zoom level, and visible bounds.
  - save_screenshots: Export screenshots for multiple nodes and write them to the local filesystem. Re
  - scan_nodes_by_types: Find all nodes of specific types in a subtree, regardless of name. Use search_no
  - scan_text_nodes: Scan all TEXT nodes in a subtree and return their content. Shorthand for scan_no
  - search_nodes: Search for nodes by name substring and/or type within a subtree. Use this when y
--- unreal-mcp ---
  - deep_research: Web research and GPS geocoding — no API key required. Use 'search' to look up an
  - execute_python_code: Execute Python code in Unreal Engine. IMPORTANT: Use 'import unreal' (lowercase)
  - discover_python_module: Discover contents of a Python module. IMPORTANT: The module name is 'unreal' (lo
  - discover_python_class: Discover methods and attributes of one or MORE Python classes in a single call. 
  - discover_python_function: Get signature and documentation for a Python function.
  - list_python_subsystems: List all Unreal Engine editor subsystems. Access via: unreal.get_editor_subsyste
  - terrain_data: Generate heightmaps, map images, and water feature data from real-world terrain.
  - list_toolsets: List all available toolsets with names and descriptions.
  - describe_toolset: Get detailed information about a toolset including all tool names, descriptions,
  - call_tool: Call a tool by name. Provide toolset_name to call a toolset tool, or omit it to

content.text:
Вот что я нашёл по зарегистрированным командам (tools) в твоей pi-инстанции:

## MCP-серверы

### 1. **figma-mcp-go** (20 инструментов)
| Инструмент | Описание |
|---|---|
| `export_frames_to_pdf` | Экспорт фреймов в PDF |
| `export_tokens` | Экспорт дизайн-токенов (JSON/CSS) |
| `get_annotations` | Получение аннотаций |
| `get_design_context` | Дерево выбора/страницы |
| `get_document` | Полное дерево страницы |
| `get_fonts` | Список шрифтов |
| `get_local_components` | Локальные компоненты |
| `get_metadata` | Метаданные документа |
| `get_node` | Узел по ID |
| `get_nodes_info` | Несколько узлов по ID |
| `get_pages` | Список страниц |
| `get_reactions` | Прототип-реакции |
| `get_selection` | Текущий selection |
| `get_styles` | Локальные стили |
| `get_variable_defs` | Переменные |
| `get_viewport` | Вьюпорт |
| `save_screenshots` | Скриншоты узлов |
| `scan_nodes_by_types` | Поиск по типам |
| `scan_text_nodes` | Поиск текстовых узлов |
| `search_nodes` | Поиск по имени/типу |

### 2. **unreal-mcp** (10 инструментов)
| Инструмент | Описание |
|---|---|
| `deep_research` | Веб-поиск + геолокация |
| `execute_python_code` | Выполнение Python в Unreal |
| `discover_python_module` | Исследование Python-модулей |
| `discover_python_class` | Классы и методы |
| `discover_python_function` | Функции и сигнатуры |
| `list_python_subsystems` | Подсистемы Unreal |
| `terrain_data` | Генерация карт/высот |
| `list_toolsets` | Список тулсетов |
| `describe_toolset` | Описание тулсета |
| `call_tool` | Вызов инструмента |

## Установленные пакеты (extensions/skills)
- **pi-minimal-web** (v0.2.0) — минимальный веб-поиск через Exa
- **loop-police** (v1.3.0) — loop detection / prevention
- **pi-sub** (v0.1) — подписка/подсистема

## Кастомные расширения
- `add-context.ts` — добавление контекста
- `web-search-guidance.ts` — руководство по веб-поиску

---

Хочешь узнать подробнее про какой-то конкретный инструмент или пакет?

content.thinking: Found it! Let me read the slash-commands.js file to see what commands are available.

content.text:
import { APP_NAME } from "../config.js";
export const BUILTIN_SLASH_COMMANDS = [
    { name: "settings", description: "Open settings menu" },
    { name: "model", description: "Select model (opens selector UI)" },
    { name: "scoped-models", description: "Enable/disable models for Ctrl+P cycling" },
    { name: "export", description: "Export session (HTML default, or specify path: .html/.jsonl)" },
    { name: "import", description: "Import and resume a session from a JSONL file" },
    { name: "share", description: "Share session as a secret GitHub gist" },
    { name: "copy", description: "Copy last agent message to clipboard" },
    { name: "name", description: "Set session display name" },
    { name: "session", description: "Show session info and stats" },
    { name: "changelog", description: "Show changelog entries" },
    { name: "hotkeys", description: "Show all keyboard shortcuts" },
    { name: "fork", description: "Create a new fork from a previous user message" },
    { name: "clone", description: "Duplicate the current session at the current position" },
    { name: "tree", description: "Navigate session tree (switch branches)" },
    { name: "trust", description: "Save project trust decision for future sessions" },
    { name: "login", description: "Configure provider authentication" },
    { name: "logout", description: "Remove provider authentication" },
    { name: "new", description: "Start a new session" },
    { name: "compact", description: "Manually compact the session context" },
    { name: "resume", description: "Resume a different session" },
    { name: "reload", description: "Reload keybindings, extensions, skills, prompts, and themes" },
    { name: "quit", description: `Quit ${APP_NAME}` },
];
//# sourceMappingURL=slash-commands.js.map
